about.title: About me
about.p2: I studied at the SAIKT Programming Academy for 5 years and now I am studying at SibSUTIS University in Novosibirsk, Russia, at the Faculty of Network Data Transmission Technologies.
about.p3: Stack: Python / C++ / TypeScript / React / QT / Docker / PostgreSQL.
about.p4: I build services that help solve my clients problems.
about.p5: I am also interested in cybersecurity and OSINT - developing tools for both offensive security and intelligence gathering.

items.title: Ghostly Grabber
items.info: A OSINT tool for automated collection and analysis of data from Telegram channels and chats with complete content archiving
items.brief: An OSINT tool for automated data collection and analysis from Telegram channels and chats
items.description: OSINT - tool for automated collection and analysis of data from Telegram channels and chats with full archiving of content and building a graph of user communication

items.title: The OWL
items.info: OWL - task and project management app designed specifically for developers
items.brief: A desktop app for managing projects, boards, columns, and tasks designed specifically for developers
items.description: OWL is a powerful and intuitive desktop application for managing projects, boards, columns, and tasks, designed specifically for developers. It features a seamless interface, advanced statistics, keyboard shortcuts, and deep integration with the OWL_BACKEND REST API.

items.title: OWL Rest API
items.info: A microservice-based RESTful API for OWL APP
items.brief: A microservice-based RESTful API for project, board, and task management
items.description: OWL API is a microservice-based RESTful API for project, board, and task management, featuring user authentication, subscription management, and admin monitoring. All services are built with Flask, use PostgreSQL, and are orchestrated via Docker Compose.

items.title: IPSA
items.info: IPSA is a bot investment assistant with the ability to predict stock prices using its own neural network
items.brief: A Telegram bot that provides stock market insights with AI-powered price predictions
items.description: IPSA is a Telegram bot designed to provide users with stock market insights, including price predictions, news parsing, and fundamental analysis. Built using the Pyrogram library, the bot integrates with a deep learning model for stock price forecasting, a news parser for real-time market updates, and a database for user and stock management. The bot supports user authentication, stock tracking, and admin controls, with a token-based system for accessing premium features. The project leverages TensorFlow for stock price predictions, yfinance for financial data, and BeautifulSoup for web scraping. It includes asynchronous news parsing, real-time notifications, and report generation in Excel format.

items.title: IPSA MODEL
items.info: Neural network model for IPSA
items.brief: A model for predicting stock prices based on historical data
items.description: This project implements a deep learning model for predicting stock prices using historical stock market data. The model leverages a combination of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Units (GRUs), and an Attention mechanism to capture temporal patterns and dependencies in stock data. The model is trained on a dataset containing multiple stock tickers and predicts the closing price based on a sequence of historical data. The codebase is written in Python, utilizing TensorFlow for model building, scikit-learn for preprocessing, and pandas for data handling. The model is designed to process multiple stock tickers, scale the data, create sequences for training, and evaluate performance using metrics like Mean Absolute Error (MAE), Mean Squared Error (MSE), and R² score.

items.title: Pretty Profile
items.info: Generate a pretty art style profile card from your GitHub data!
items.brief: A service for generating beautiful, customizable SVG profile cards from GitHub data
items.description: Pretty Banner is a Next.js-based service for generating beautiful, customizable SVG banners with GitHub profile statistics. It is designed for use in GitHub READMEs, personal websites, and dashboards, providing visually appealing, themeable, and informative profile cards.

items.title: Log Insight
items.info: Program for analyzing log files and detecting anomalies in program operation
items.brief: A CLI tool for analyzing log files and detecting anomalies in program operation
items.description: LogInsight empowers developers and system administrators to monitor, filter, and analyze logs with ease. Whether you're debugging applications or tracking system performance, LogInsight provides real-time insights with a user-friendly cli.

items.title: Tech Support Bot
items.info: Tech support telegram bot
items.brief: A multilingual Telegram bot for user support and feedback collection for my projects
items.description:
A Telegram bot for user support, bug reporting, idea collection, and development order requests. The bot supports multiple languages and can work both in polling mode (locally) and via webhook (e.g., on Vercel).

Features
 - Accepts user requests (bug reports, feature suggestions, development orders)
 - Supports attachments: text, photos, videos, documents
 - Multilingual interface (Russian, English, Japanese, Spanish)
 - Notifies a dedicated support chat about new tickets
 - Ticket (new, in progress, completed, review) 
 - Users can change the interface language

items.title: SkyFall Website
items.info: Brand presentation website for SkyFall, an open-source OSINT platform built with PySide6
items.brief: A brand presentation website for the SkyFall OSINT platform with smooth GSAP animations
items.description: SkyFall Website is a brand presentation site built with Vite + React 18 + TypeScript. It showcases the SkyFall OSINT platform, an open-source intelligence tool developed in PySide6. The site features smooth animations powered by GSAP, seamless scrolling with Lenis, and a clean, modern design using the Outfit font family.

items.title: SkyFall
items.info: Open-source OSINT platform built with PySide6 — information gathering, Telegram OSINT, file analysis, and more
items.brief: Open-source OSINT platform on PySide6 — information gathering, Telegram OSINT, file analysis, face search, and more
items.description: SkyFall is a comprehensive open-source OSINT (Open Source Intelligence) platform with a PySide6 graphical interface. It performs deep analysis of web resources and IP addresses — DNS, SSL/TLS, WHOIS, open ports (nmap 1–65535), WAF detection, malware reputation checks, and subdomain discovery. The platform includes a powerful dorking engine with 7974 exploits from Exploit-DB GHDB, Telegram OSINT with multi-account and proxy support, file analysis with metadata extraction, EXIF stripping, MAC/BSSID geolocation with interactive maps, email and username search across 3800+ sites, face search, GitHub OSINT with secret scanning (270+ patterns), phone number OSINT, and blockchain transaction search across 10 networks. Features an interactive graph editor with draggable nodes, connection ports, and export formats including GraphML, GEXF, JSON, CSV, PNG, HTML, and Obsidian Markdown.

items.title: CV Creator Bot
items.info: My client's Telegram bot that helps quickly interact with people and increase sales of their services
items.brief: A Telegram bot for creating, reviewing, and delivering resumes with a multi-tier wizard
items.description: CV Creator Bot is a Telegram bot built with TypeScript and Telegraf for resume creation, review, and delivery. It features video review scenarios, payment collection via card and SBP with receipt verification, an admin panel for anonymous file delivery, email support via Nodemailer, and interview scheduling with automated reminders. The bot runs in polling mode locally and webhook mode on Vercel, with a Calendly integration for scheduling.

items.title: ProxySniffer

items.brief: A Python tool for parsing and checking HTTP, HTTPS, SOCKS4 and SOCKS5 proxies
items.description: A simple program for obtaining and testing working proxy sheets [HTTP - HTTPS - SOCKS4 - SOCKS5]
